description: Test cases for the HistoryOS evaluator. Each case is a counterfactual 'what if' question targeted at the ingested corpus (see ingestion/topics.py). Used by evaluation/evaluator.py to spot-check critical rules end-to-end.

cases.question: What if the Mughal Empire had industrialized before the British arrived?
What if Britain had never colonized India and the British East India Company had been expelled in 1757?
What if Germany had not invaded Poland in 1939 and the Second World War had been delayed by a decade?
What if the Western Roman Empire had successfully resisted the barbarian invasions of the 5th century?
expected_corpus: Fall of the Western Roman Empire

cases.question: What if Louis XVI had escaped to Austria before the French Revolution executed him?
What if Genghis Khan had died in childhood before unifying the Mongol tribes?
What if the Ottoman Empire had successfully completed its Tanzimat modernization and survived past 1922?
expected_corpus: Decline and modernization of the Ottoman Empire

cases.question: What if the Cuban Missile Crisis had escalated into a nuclear exchange between the United States and the Soviet Union?
